name: Mozzarella Chicken Breasts
recipeInstructions:
1. Open the chicken breasts but do not cut them in half.
2. Sprinkle the insides with salt, pepper, parsley, shallot, and add a slice of mozzarella. Replace the top of the chicken breasts.
3. Sprinkle the flour over the stuffed breasts.
4. Dip the floured breasts into the egg.
5. Finally, dip the breasts in the breadcrumbs, pressing the crumbs well into the egg coating.
6. Heat oil and butter in a frying pan.
7. Seal the breasts on all sides until golden brown.
8. Transfer to an oven-proof dish and finish cooking in a moderate oven for about 15 minutes.
9. Serve hot, either whole or sliced.
